text.title: Lead Magnet for Solo Consultancy Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Lead Magnet for Solo Consultancy. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: 20-page 'Ultimate Guide to X' eBook; 800 downloads, 0 calls booked in 60 days.
antipattern.root-cause: Format encodes no opinion or data; competes with publisher SEO.
antipattern.fix: Replace with niche audit checklist OR opinionated benchmark report; cap at 6 pages; keep one promise.

antipattern.symptom: Operator tracks signups/week as KPI; list grows to 5k, 0 paying clients converted.
antipattern.root-cause: Filters-not-collects rule violated; magnet attracts students, peers, competitors.
antipattern.fix: Switch primary KPI to qualified call booked / week; redesign magnet to repel non-ICP.

antipattern.symptom: Magnet ships; 200 downloads; no automated emails; conversion = 0.
antipattern.root-cause: Follow-up-mandatory rule skipped; manual outreach never happens at solo scale.
antipattern.fix: Wire 3-7 email automation (ESP) before launch; magnet does not go live without it.

antipattern.symptom: Magnet promises 'audit + benchmark + calculator + checklist'; conversion under 1%.
antipattern.root-cause: one-narrow-promise rule violated; landing page reads as listicle.
antipattern.fix: Split into 4 standalone magnets; ship one; promote one.
